summary: A Fox News 'The Faulkner Focus' / Fox News Alert segment featuring anchor narration plus a studio data graphic breaking down 174 criminal aliens deported to Mexico by category (drug trafficking, theft, gang members, etc.) and Secretary Noem soundbites. It is a TV news package, not a stylized or music-driven entertainment piece, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: NOEM: WILL USE EVERY TOOL TO MAKE COMMUNITIES SAFER; 174 CRIMINAL ALIENS DEPORTED TO MEXICO; HOUSTON ICE DEPORTS 2 CONVICTED MURDERERS, 24 GANG MEMBERS; FOX NEWS ALERT
